fields.label: Access Token
fields.helpText: From Buffer -> Settings -> Apps -> Access Token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates access token via Buffer user endpoint

metadata.summary: Buffer social media management for scheduling and publishing.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to buffer.com and sign in to your account
2. Navigate to account.buffer.com/access-tokens
3. Click 'Create Access Token'
4. Copy the generated access token value
